intentSynonyms: toggle a favorite store in starbucks
add or remove a store from favorites in starbucks
description: Add or remove a Starbucks store from your favorites list. Use find_stores to discover store IDs.

store_number.description: Store number (the internal store ID, e.g., "1028036"). Available from find_stores results as store_id.

favorite.description: true to add to favorites, false to remove
